query:
UPDATE leaderboard
               SET best_score      = ?,
                   best_time_secs  = ?,
                   recorded_at     = ?
               WHERE user_id = ?
                 AND (
                     best_score IS NULL
                     OR ? > best_score
                     OR (? = best_score AND (best_time_secs IS NULL OR ? < best_time_secs))
                 )
